name: facilitation
description: Ten facilitation skills grounded in canonical sources: Rob Evans' Collaboration Code (Patterns, Tools, Models, Casebook — the EY/MG Taylor wavespace tradition), Klein & Newman's Facilitating Collaboration (Value Web), Lewrick et al.'s The Design Thinking Playbook, Hoffman's Meeting Design, van der Pijl/Lokitz/Solomon's Design a Better Business, and Gray/Brown/Macanufo's Gamestorming. A senior facilitator persona plus nine specialists: meeting architect, multi-day workshop designer, collaboration pattern librarian, design thinking coach, strategic visualizer (canvases), decision architect, group dynamics coach, virtual/hybrid specialist, and gamestorming coach. Nine ready-to-use templates. One agent (facilitation-agent) sequences them. Six slash commands cover the lifecycle: /scope, /design-session, /pick-game, /triage-meeting, /decision-rule, /recap. v0.3 added the gamestorming coach skill with a 123-game catalog. v0.2 added deep per-pattern (91), per-tool (~110), per-model (33), and per-case (19) catalogs from the Collaboration Code series — the skills carry the depth so you don't have to crack the source PDFs.
